message:
fix: replace fragile string matching with typed APIError for HTTP status checks

Introduce APIError type in client.go that carries the HTTP status code,
replacing fmt.Errorf-based error strings. Update statetransition.go and
reconcile.go to use errors.As instead of strings.Contains for status
code detection, making the error handling robust against message changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
